constraints.name: operation_type
constraints.description: Specifies the four allowed activity types and their deterministic laddu accrual rules: CONTEST_WON yields 300 + max(0, 20 - rank), TOP_CONTRIBUTOR yields 300, BUG_FOUND yields severity points, and CONTEST_HOSTED yields 50.
constraints.formal: accrual(type, param) = {300 + max(0, 20 - rank) if type == CONTEST_WON; 300 if type == TOP_CONTRIBUTOR; severity if type == BUG_FOUND; 50 if type == CONTEST_HOSTED}

constraints.name: range_bound
constraints.description: Each monthly redemption must consume at least a fixed threshold of laddus (200 for origin 'INDIAN', 400 for 'NON_INDIAN'), restricting the maximum number of feasible redemptions to floor(total_accrued / threshold).

objective.description: 计算在固定月度兑换阈值下,总积分可覆盖的最大月数

invariants.name: state_transition
invariants.description: 算法在顺序遍历活动记录时,持续维护一个累加器状态,该状态始终等于已处理活动所获积分的总和。每次状态转移严格依据活动类型与参数按确定规则增加对应分值,保证累加过程的确定性与无后效性,最终通过固定阈值的整除运算推导结果。
